PQ_TD_Source.purpose: Raw ingest for testing/defect source workbook and selected sheets.
PQ_TD_Source.notes: Reference-only PQ used for traceability and troubleshooting.

PQ_TD_Detail.purpose: Canonical row-level testing/defect table with helper flags and link key.
PQ_TD_Detail.dependencies: PQ_TD_Source + alias mapping + section classification logic
PQ_TD_Detail.notes: Feeds summary/workstream rollups and future cross-domain linking.

PQ_TD_Summary.purpose: Section-level and ALL-level testing/defect aggregate metrics.
PQ_TD_Summary.notes: Primary validation rollup for section totals and rates.

PQ_TD_Workstream.purpose: Workstream and owner drilldown for testing/defect domain.
PQ_TD_Workstream.notes: Supports detailed validation by workstream and user.

PQ_TD_Detail.Section: Regex classification using source sheet, cycle, task and test text.
PQ_TD_Detail.HasDefectLink: DefectCount > 0 OR DefectID present OR (DefectsNew + DefectsInProgress + DefectsClosed) > 0.

PQ_TD_Summary.TotalTests: Count of detail rows in grouping.

PQ_TD_Workstream.TotalTests: Count of detail rows by Section + Workstream (+Owner).

PQ_RAID_Source.purpose: Raw ingest for RAID log workbook and included RAID sheets.
PQ_RAID_Source.notes: Reference/lineage table for traceability and audit of source rows.

PQ_RAID_Detail.purpose: Canonical row-level RAID table with normalized type/status/priority and KPI helper flags.
PQ_RAID_Detail.dependencies: PQ_RAID_Source + alias mapping + RAID type inference
PQ_RAID_Detail.notes: Feeds RAID summary/workstream rollups and dashboard consumption.

PQ_RAID_Summary.purpose: ALL-level and type-level RAID KPI rollup.
PQ_RAID_Summary.notes: Primary validation rollup for open, overdue, and high-priority load.

PQ_RAID_Workstream.notes: Supports leadership review and owner accountability views.

PQ_RAID_Detail.RaidType: Inferred from RAID type field plus source sheet/name text into RISK/ISSUE/ACTION/ASSUMPTION/DEPENDENCY/OTHER.
PQ_RAID_Detail.IsOverdue: IsOpen AND DueDate is before today.
PQ_RAID_Detail.IsDueNext14: IsOpen AND DueDate is between today and today+14 days.
PQ_RAID_Detail.IsHighPriority: Priority text contains critical/high/p1/sev1 OR RiskScore >= high_priority_score_threshold.

PQ_RAID_Summary.TotalItems: Count of detail rows by RaidType and ALL.

PQ_RAID_Workstream.TotalItems: Count of detail rows by RaidType + Workstream (+Owner).

domains.name: tasks
domains.mpp_path: C:\Users\jsw73\OneDrive - AMETEK Inc\SAP Implementation Project - Documents\00 - PMO\02 - Project Planning\AMETEK SAP S4 Master Project Plan 3ITC May.mpp

PQ_Task_Source.purpose: Raw export from MS Project .mpp file with all task hierarchy levels.
PQ_Task_Source.notes: Complete task list (levels 1-7) for audit and hierarchy reconstruction.

PQ_Task_Detail.purpose: Canonical row-level execution task table excluding Close4D milestone and summary/milestone rows.
PQ_Task_Detail.dependencies: PQ_Task_Source + execution-task filtering + status/progress calculation + workstream custom field
PQ_Task_Detail.notes: Counts execution tasks only. Workstream is sourced from configured MS Project workstream field (Text1 by default).

PQ_Task_Summary.purpose: Workstream-level and ALL-level task KPI rollup.
PQ_Task_Summary.notes: Primary validation rollup for open, in-progress, overdue, and immediate-attention metrics.

PQ_Task_Workstream.purpose: Task KPI drilldown by workstream and status.
PQ_Task_Workstream.notes: Supports status-based filtering and workstream accountability views.

PQ_Task_Detail.TaskID: Unique task ID from MS Project.
PQ_Task_Detail.OutlineLevel: Original hierarchy level from MS Project.
PQ_Task_Detail.Workstream: Read directly from configured MS Project workstream field (Text1 by default).
PQ_Task_Detail.IsExecutionTask: TRUE for rows counted after excluding Close4D, summary tasks, milestone tasks, and blank task names.
PQ_Task_Detail.IsSummaryTask: Original MS Project summary flag for the task.
PQ_Task_Detail.IsMilestoneTask: Original MS Project milestone flag for the task.
PQ_Task_Detail.IsClose4D: TRUE when task name contains Close4D pattern.
PQ_Task_Detail.Status: Computed from PercentComplete: Complete (100%), In Progress (0-99% + progress), Overdue (past finish + not 100%), Not Started.
PQ_Task_Detail.IsOverdue: TRUE if IsOpen AND FinishDate < today.
PQ_Task_Detail.IsDueNext14: TRUE if IsOpen AND FinishDate between today and today+14 days.
PQ_Task_Detail.IsImmediateAttention: TRUE if Overdue OR (DueNext7 AND InProgress) OR (InProgress AND Overdue).
PQ_Task_Detail.Reason: Text explanation for immediate attention inclusion (e.g., 'Overdue', 'Due Soon (In Progress)', 'Low Progress').

PQ_Task_Summary.TotalTasks: Count of detail rows by workstream and ALL.

PQ_Task_Workstream.TotalTasks: Count of detail rows by Workstream + Status.
